---
title: "Executive Summary"
---

## Purpose of this report

This report assesses the current state and future direction of virtual store technology for NASA data. It documents mature implementations, developing approaches, known limitations, governance gaps, and recommended next steps.

## Summary of recommendations and current state

Virtual store technology is ready for production use with consistently gridded data and is actively being developed for more complex data types.

Key recommendations include:
* adopting Icechunk (see [Technical Overview](./technical-overview.qmd))
* adopting the GeoZarr standard (see [Technical Overview](./technical-overview.qmd))
* planning for integration with other NASA services, such as EGIS and Harmony (see [NASA Ecosystem](./nasa-ecosystem.qmd)), and,
* addressing governance gaps, specifically standardizing CMR metadata approaches (see [Governance](./governance.qmd))

See the [Recommendations](recommendations.qmd) section for the full summary.
